results.title: Sandborn breaks high-jump record
results.description: FREEMAN - Seems that long-standing high jump records were just meant to finally be broken during the 2026 track and field season in the area. Following Cheney's Abram Weins who set a new standard for Cheney High School several weeks ago with a 6-foot, 8-inch delivery, along comes Freeman's Trenton Sandborn who went one better. Sandborn set a school record of 7-feet at the 2B District...

results.title: Yamal desperate to make mark on 'his World Cup', says Karanka
results.description: Barcelona's 18-year-old superstar Yamal has not played since suffering a hamstring injury on April 22.
